title: turnera harleyi
intro: Turnera harleyi, also known as Yellow Spurge, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Turnera harleyi include reducing fever, alleviating joint pain, and improving digestion. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture for its herbal benefits, making it a popular natural remedy in some regions.
